info.title: IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDoseVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: bOPV birth dose (a zero dose) was not administered-146
Client's age is less than 1 week-39
Client is due for the bOPV birth dose-87
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 week-39
Client is not due for the bOPV birth dose-48
bOPV birth dose (a zero dose) was administered-146

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDoseVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTPolioBirthDoseVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
